widget.name: Nexus Looker
widget.description: Adds an "eye" button next to every file in amoCRM chats, notes and emails. Opens a modal preview for PDF, DOCX, XLSX, PPTX, CSV, Markdown, images (including SVG), plain text, and legacy Office formats (.doc/.xls/.ppt). No download required.

errors.unsupported: Format not yet supported. Please download the file instead.
errors.too_large: File is too large to preview (over {{limit}} MB). Please download it.
errors.converter_failed: Conversion service is unavailable. Try later or download the file.
errors.preview_failed: Could not prepare preview. Try later or download the file.
errors.rate_limited: Too many requests. Please wait a minute and try again.
